name: Diva Makeup Studio
author: Poki
description: Diva Makeup Studio is a colorful makeover game where you create your own signature glam look! MChoose from a range of makeup and vibrant items, mix colours to build a unique palette, then apply eye makeup and other details to transform the girl’s face. Finish up and see how your final creation is rated. Ready to show off your makeup skills and shine like a diva? How to play Diva Makeup Studio? Click or tap to make the choice and play. Who created Diva Makeup Studio? Diva Makeup Studio is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Diva Hair Salon , Bottle Flip Challenge , Bowling Champion , Hit the Fan , Penalty Rivals , Ping Pong Go! , Speed Pool King , and Truck Slam ! How can I play Diva Makeup Studio for free? You can play Diva Makeup Studio for free on Poki. Can I play Diva Makeup Studio on mobile devices and desktop? Diva Makeup Studio can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
